title: View Archived items
excerpt: How do I view Archived Actions?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @GeoffAirey - if you want to view records you archived within a board you can do this via the menu on the board:

If you want to view archived boards go main settings > Archive:

Thanks
Mark

posts.author: GeoffAirey (Geoff Airey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks again @mark.anley, not very intuitive and I couldn’t find anything on this board explaining.

Appreciate your help though.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @GeoffAirey

It look like this post here View Archived items - #2 by mark.anley might have answered your question, is that correct?
